title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw in Behalf of the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) to Donate One (1) Unit of Portable High Speed Bag Closing Machine to Samahan ng mga Magsasaka sa Maahas with Office Address at Barangay Maahas, Los Baños, Laguna Represented by Its President Mr. Roderic B. Reyes. (AUTHOR: HON. CRIS DAYRIL B. BAGNES, 04/12/2021)
